title: Older Lower Trust Closeout Audit
goal: Classify the older needs-audit closeouts surfaced by `intent_validation_contract.closeout_reconciliation` after #325.
non_goals: No lane closure by this artifact alone.

review_mode.review question: Which older closed items have sufficient evidence, and which are covered by open follow-up or active roadmap lanes?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: summary closeout_reconciliation output, planning roadmap state, finished-work evidence, external-intent evidence, recent issue/commit context already captured by #324/#325

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; gh issue view 329 --json number,title,body,state,url

issue_classifications.title: Add a local-only installation mode
issue_classifications.evidence: Local-only installation/adoption is represented by current config/reporting surfaces and later local-only integration work; no open issue points back to #206.
issue_classifications.follow_up: None for the old closed item.

issue_classifications.title: Design for graceful partial compliance
issue_classifications.evidence: Multiple partial-compliance slices landed, but the roadmap still keeps `graceful-partial-compliance` visible.

issue_classifications.title: Make core package surfaces cheaper for generic agents
issue_classifications.evidence: Compact startup/preflight/summary surfaces now exist; remaining generic-agent compliance pressure is tracked by the graceful-partial-compliance roadmap lane.

issue_classifications.title: Make the default entry path easier for generic agents
issue_classifications.evidence: Root AGENTS adapter and compact startup commands route agents into package-owned surfaces.
issue_classifications.follow_up: Roadmap lane `graceful-partial-compliance` for any remaining bypass-trust pressure.

issue_classifications.title: Make core package surfaces easier for generic agents to use
issue_classifications.evidence: The package now exposes compact summary/preflight/report surfaces; #325 adds the missing reconciliation view.
issue_classifications.follow_up: Roadmap lane `graceful-partial-compliance` if generic-agent cost remains high.

issue_classifications.title: Surface lower-trust signals when package use was likely bypassed
issue_classifications.evidence: Summary exposes lower-trust closeout counts and #325 adds actionable reconciliation categories.
issue_classifications.follow_up: None for the old closed signal; new issues should be filed for new bypass patterns.

issue_classifications.title: Reopen delegated-run review
issue_classifications.evidence: Delegated-run review residue was absorbed into planning/handoff closeout contracts and finished-work inspection surfaces.

issue_classifications.title: Surface planning-surface drift immediately at resume/startup
issue_classifications.evidence: `agentic-workspace summary --format json` and planning checks expose planning_surface_health; current runs report clean state.

issue_classifications.title: Turn unlogged recurring friction into durable improvement pressure
issue_classifications.evidence: Recurring friction is now fed into issues and roadmap state during dogfooding; #329 itself was created from such a signal.
issue_classifications.follow_up: Current roadmap lanes continue carrying newly discovered friction.

issue_classifications.title: Add an explicit planning-memory handshake
issue_classifications.evidence: Execplan templates and summary contracts include pre-work memory pull and post-work posterity fields.
issue_classifications.follow_up: None for the old handshake slice.

issue_classifications.title: Prompt pre-work memory pull explicitly
issue_classifications.evidence: Execplan context_budget includes `pre-work memory pull` and summary/handoff surfaces preserve it.

issue_classifications.title: Prompt post-work posterity capture explicitly
issue_classifications.evidence: Execplan execution_summary includes `post-work posterity capture` and archive gates require closeout evidence.

issue_classifications.title: Add an explicit planning-config handshake
issue_classifications.evidence: Preflight/config/report commands and execplan config-compliance fields now make config pull/check explicit.

issue_classifications.title: Add an explicit memory-config handshake
issue_classifications.evidence: Memory/config handshake behavior is represented in current config and memory guidance surfaces.

issue_classifications.title: Surface dangling larger intent and lower-trust closeout signals
issue_classifications.evidence: Intent validation contract reports dangling/lower-trust counts; #325 adds closeout reconciliation states.
issue_classifications.follow_up: None for #257; #329 closes the older needs-audit residue surfaced by #325.

issue_classifications.title: Make the default entry path easier for generic agents
issue_classifications.evidence: Default entry path was slimmed and compact startup commands exist; remaining partial-compliance concerns stay in the roadmap.

issue_classifications.title: Formalize modules and repo-custom workflow extensions
issue_classifications.evidence: Config/report/defaults surfaces now expose module and workflow obligations for planning consumption.
issue_classifications.follow_up: None for the old module-formalization slice.

issue_classifications.title: Build structured agent configuration system
issue_classifications.evidence: Structured config substrate landed; #278/#327 continue formal workflow substrate follow-through.

issue_classifications.title: Define structured config model and authority map
issue_classifications.evidence: Workspace config contract, authority markers, and ownership review expose structured configuration authority.

issue_classifications.title: Design selective loading and compact queries
issue_classifications.evidence: Preflight, summary, config, report, ownership, and defaults provide compact query paths.

issue_classifications.title: Make prose entry surfaces compatibility adapters
issue_classifications.evidence: Root/package AGENTS adapters are thin routers; generated compatibility artifact cleanup remains planned.

issue_classifications.title: Make system intent shape implementation tradeoffs
issue_classifications.evidence: System intent alignment fields are present in execplans and summary/handoff contracts.
issue_classifications.follow_up: Roadmap keeps system-intent-operational-follow-through visible for post-audit verification, but #274 itself is evidenced.

issue_classifications.title: Add package-owned mirrored system-intent contract
issue_classifications.evidence: System intent contract and sync/report surfaces exist and are referenced by planning summaries.

issue_classifications.title: Improve takeover robustness with preflight-first workflow gates
issue_classifications.evidence: Preflight-first startup and execution_readiness gates are now used by dogfooding workflow.

issue_classifications.title: Resolve portable execplan semantics against local execution posture
issue_classifications.evidence: Handoff/summary contracts expose runtime posture and delegation guidance without binding to one runtime.

issue_classifications.title: Add preflight/runtime-resolution slice
issue_classifications.evidence: Preflight and handoff outputs turn config and execution posture into actionable guidance.

issue_classifications.title: Add compact handoff/prompt-generation slice
issue_classifications.evidence: Prompt and handoff surfaces exist for bounded external/strong reasoning escalation.

issue_classifications.title: Delegate system-intent extraction to agents
issue_classifications.evidence: System-intent sync and compiled contract surfaces exist; current planning references the compiled system intent contract.

findings.title: Older needs-audit closeouts are now reconciled
findings.summary: The older set is split between evidence-present and follow-up-open; none require reopening from this audit.
findings.evidence: The classifications above are consumed by `intent_validation_contract.closeout_reconciliation`.
findings.risk if unchanged: Summary would keep reporting older needs-audit items even after the package can classify them.
findings.suggested action: Close #329 after summary confirms zero needs-audit items from this older set.
findings.source: checked-in planning state and summary reconciliation output
findings.post-remediation note shape: remove first-lane audit debt only when summary confirms it is classified

recommendation.defer: Implementation follow-ups remain in their roadmap lanes.

retention.closeout shape: retain while summary reconciliation references this artifact
retention.trigger: until a generated reconciliation report supersedes manual audit artifacts

drift_log: 2026-04-26: Created after #325 exposed older needs-audit closeout IDs through compact summary.
